# shinyWidgets

> Extend widgets available in [shiny](https://github.com/rstudio/shiny)

## Overview

This package provide custom widgets and other components to enhance your
shiny applications.

You can replace classical checkboxes with switch button, add colors to
radio buttons and checkbox group, use buttons as radio or checkboxes.
Each widget has an `update` method to change the value of an input from
the server.

## Installation

Install from [CRAN](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=shinyWidgets)
with:

``` r
install.packages("shinyWidgets")
```

Or install the development version from
[GitHub](https://github.com/dreamRs/shinyWidgets) with:

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("dreamRs/shinyWidgets")
```

## Demo

A gallery application is included in the package. Once installed, use
the following command to launch it:

``` r
shinyWidgets::shinyWidgetsGallery()
```

A live version is available here :
<http://shinyapps.dreamrs.fr/shinyWidgets>

## Widgets

### Single checkbox

- **Bootstrap switch**

Turn checkboxes into toggle switches :

![switchInput](reference/figures/switchInput.png)

switchInput

``` r
switchInput(inputId = "id", value = TRUE)
```

- **Material switch**

Turn checkboxes into toggle switches :

![materialSwitch](reference/figures/materialSwitch.png)

materialSwitch

``` r
materialSwitch(inputId = "id", label = "Primary switch", status = "danger")
```

- **Pretty checkbox**

``` r
prettyCheckbox(
  inputId = "id", label = "Check me!", icon = icon("check")
)
```

- **Pretty switch**

``` r
prettySwitch(
  inputId = "id",
  label = "Switch:",
  fill = TRUE, 
  status = "primary"
)
```

- **Pretty toggle**

``` r
prettyToggle(
  inputId = "id",
  label_on = "Checked!",
  label_off = "Unchecked..."
)
```

### Checkboxes and radio buttons

- **Bootstrap buttons**

![checkboxGroupButtons](reference/figures/checkboxGroupButtons.png)

checkboxGroupButtons

``` r
checkboxGroupButtons( # or radioGroupButtons
  inputId = "id",
  label = "Choice: ",
  choices = c("A", "B", "C")
)
```

- **Pretty checkbox group and radio buttons**

``` r
prettyCheckboxGroup( # or prettyRadioButtons
  inputId = "id",
  label = "Choice",
  choices = c("A", "B", "c"),
  outline = TRUE,
  plain = TRUE,
  status = "primary",
  icon = icon("check")
)
```

### Select menu

- **Bootstrap select picker**

Select menu with lot of configurations options available:

![pickerInput](reference/figures/pickerInput.png)

pickerInput

``` r
pickerInput(
  inputId = "id", 
  label = "Select:", 
  choices = month.name, 
  options = pickerOptions(
    actionsBox = TRUE, 
    size = 10,
    selectedTextFormat = "count > 3"
  ), 
  multiple = TRUE
)
```

- **Virtual select**

Select menu that can support long list of choices:

![virtualSelectInput](reference/figures/virtual-select.png)

virtualSelectInput

``` r
virtualSelectInput(
  inputId = "id",
  label = "Select:",
  choices = list(
    "Spring" = c("March", "April", "May"),
    "Summer" = c("June", "July", "August"),
    "Autumn" = c("September", "October", "November"),
    "Winter" = c("December", "January", "February")
  ),
  showValueAsTags = TRUE,
  search = TRUE,
  multiple = TRUE
)
```

### Date picker

- **Air Datepicker**

Date (or month or year) picker with lot of options and a timepicker
integrated :

![airDatepickerInput](reference/figures/air-datepicker.png)

airDatepickerInput

``` r
airDatepickerInput(
  inputId = "id",
  label = "Select:",
  placeholder = "Placeholder",
  multiple = 5, 
  clearButton = TRUE
)
```

### Sliders

- **Slider with Text**

Slider with strings, to pass whatever you want:

![sliderText](reference/figures/sliderText.png)

sliderText

``` r
sliderTextInput(
  inputId = "id", 
  label = "Choice:", 
  grid = TRUE, 
  force_edges = TRUE,
  choices = c(
    "Strongly disagree",
    "Disagree",
    "Neither agree nor disagree", 
    "Agree", 
    "Strongly agree"
  )
)
```

- **noUiSlider**

A range slider that can be colored, have more than two handles and
positioned vertically (among other things):

![noUiSliderInput](reference/figures/nouislider.png)

noUiSliderInput

``` r
noUiSliderInput(
  inputId = "id",
  label = "Select:",
  min = 0, 
  max = 600,
  value = c(100, 220, 400),
  tooltips = TRUE,
  step = 1
)
```

### Tree

- **Tree check**

Select value(s) in a hierarchical structure:

![treeInput](reference/figures/treeinput.png)

treeInput

``` r
treeInput(
  inputId = "ID2",
  label = "Select cities:",
  choices = create_tree(cities),
  returnValue = "text",
  closeDepth = 1
)
```

### Text

- **Search**

A text input only triggered by hitting ‘Enter’ or clicking search button
:

![search_input](reference/figures/search_input.png)

search_input

``` r
searchInput(
  inputId = "id", 
  label = "Enter your search :", 
  placeholder = "This is a placeholder", 
  btnSearch = icon("search"), 
  btnReset = icon("remove"), 
  width = "100%"
)
```

## Other functionnalities

### Sweet Alert

Show an alert message to the user to provide some feedback, via
[sweetalert2](https://sweetalert2.github.io/) library:

![sendSweetAlert](reference/figures/show_alert.png)

sendSweetAlert

See examples in
[`?show_alert`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/sweetalert.md).

Request confirmation from the user :

![confirmSweetAlert](reference/figures/ask_confirmation.png)

confirmSweetAlert

See examples in
[`?ask_confirmation`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/sweetalert-confirmation.md).

### Dropdown button

Hide input in a button :  
![dropdown_off](reference/figures/dropdown_btn_off.png)![dropdown_on](reference/figures/dropdown_btn_on.png)

``` r
dropdownButton(
  tags$h3("List of Input"),
  selectInput(inputId = 'xcol', label = 'X Variable', choices = names(iris)),
  selectInput(inputId = 'ycol', label = 'Y Variable', choices = names(iris), selected = names(iris)[[2]]),
  sliderInput(inputId = 'clusters', label = 'Cluster count', value = 3, min = 1, max = 9),
  circle = TRUE,
  status = "danger", 
  icon = icon("gear"), width = "300px",
  tooltip = tooltipOptions(title = "Click to see inputs !")
)
```

See also `?dropMenu()`

## Development

This package use [{packer}](https://github.com/JohnCoene/packer) to
manage JavaScript assets, see packer’s
[documentation](https://packer.john-coene.com/#/) for more.

Install nodes modules with:

``` r
packer::npm_install()
```

Modify inputs bindings in `srcjs/inputs/`, then run:

``` r
packer::bundle()
```

Re-install R package and try functions.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`WinBox()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/WinBox.md)
  [`closeWinBox()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/WinBox.md)
  [`applyWinBox()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/WinBox.md)
  : WinBox

- [`actionBttn()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/actionBttn.md)
  : Awesome action button

- [`actionGroupButtons()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/actionGroupButtons.md)
  : Actions Buttons Group Inputs

- [`addSpinner()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/addSpinner.md)
  : Display a spinner above an output when this one recalculate

- [`airDatepickerInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/airDatepicker.md)
  [`timepickerOptions()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/airDatepicker.md)
  [`airMonthpickerInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/airDatepicker.md)
  [`airYearpickerInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/airDatepicker.md)
  : Air Date Picker Input

- [`animateOptions()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/animateOptions.md)
  : Animate options

- [`animations`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/animations.md)
  : Animation names

- [`appendVerticalTab()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/appendVerticalTab.md)
  [`removeVerticalTab()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/appendVerticalTab.md)
  [`reorderVerticalTabs()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/appendVerticalTab.md)
  : Mutate Vertical Tabset Panel

- [`autonumericInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/autonumericInput.md)
  : Autonumeric Input Widget

- [`awesomeCheckbox()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/awesomeCheckbox.md)
  : Awesome Checkbox Input Control

- [`awesomeCheckboxGroup()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/awesomeCheckboxGroup.md)
  : Awesome Checkbox Group Input Control

- [`awesomeRadio()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/awesomeRadio.md)
  : Awesome Radio Buttons Input Control

- [`panel()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/bootstrap-utils.md)
  [`alert()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/bootstrap-utils.md)
  [`list_group()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/bootstrap-utils.md)
  : Bootstrap panel / alert

- [`calendarProInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/calendarProInput.md)
  : Calendar Pro Input

- [`checkboxGroupButtons()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/checkboxGroupButtons.md)
  : Buttons Group checkbox Input Control

- [`chooseSliderSkin()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/chooseSliderSkin.md)
  :

  Theme selector for `sliderInput`

- [`circleButton()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/circleButton.md)
  : Circle Action button

- [`closeSweetAlert()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/closeSweetAlert.md)
  : Close Sweet Alert

- [`colorPickr()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/colorPickr.md)
  : Color Pickr

- [`colorSelectorInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/colorSelectorInput.md)
  [`colorSelectorExample()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/colorSelectorInput.md)
  : Color Selector Input

- [`create_tree()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/create_tree.md)
  :

  Create choice structure for
  [`treeInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/treeInput.md)

- [`demoAirDatepicker()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/demoAirDatepicker.md)
  : Some examples on how to use airDatepickerInput

- [`demoNoUiSlider()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/demoNoUiSlider.md)
  : Some examples on how to use noUiSliderInput

- [`demoNumericRange()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/demoNumericRange.md)
  : An example showing how numericRangeInput works

- [`demoVirtualSelect()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/demoVirtualSelect.md)
  :

  Demo for
  [`virtualSelectInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/virtualSelectInput.md)

- [`useShinydashboard()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/deprecated.md)
  [`useShinydashboardPlus()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/deprecated.md)
  [`useTablerDash()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/deprecated.md)
  [`useArgonDash()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/deprecated.md)
  [`useBs4Dash()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/deprecated.md)
  [`setShadow()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/deprecated.md)
  [`setSliderColor()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/deprecated.md)
  [`colorSelectorDrop()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/deprecated.md)
  : Deprecated function

- [`downloadBttn()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/downloadBttn.md)
  :

  Create a download `actionBttn`

- [`enableDropMenu()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/drop-menu-interaction.md)
  [`disableDropMenu()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/drop-menu-interaction.md)
  [`showDropMenu()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/drop-menu-interaction.md)
  [`hideDropMenu()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/drop-menu-interaction.md)
  : Interact with Drop Menu

- [`dropMenu()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/dropMenu.md)
  : Drop Menu

- [`dropMenuOptions()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/dropMenuOptions.md)
  : Drop menu options

- [`dropdown()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/dropdown.md)
  : Dropdown

- [`dropdownButton()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/dropdownButton.md)
  : Dropdown Button

- [`execute_safely()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/execute_safely.md)
  : Execute an expression safely in server

- [`updateCurrencyInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/formaNumericInputUpdate.md)
  [`updateFormatNumericInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/formaNumericInputUpdate.md)
  : Update a Formatted Numeric Input Widget

- [`currencyInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/formatNumericInput.md)
  [`formatNumericInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/formatNumericInput.md)
  : Format Numeric Inputs

- [`html_dependency_awesome()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/html-dependencies.md)
  [`html_dependency_bttn()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/html-dependencies.md)
  [`html_dependency_pretty()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/html-dependencies.md)
  [`html_dependency_bsswitch()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/html-dependencies.md)
  [`html_dependency_sweetalert2()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/html-dependencies.md)
  : HTML dependencies

- [`html_dependency_winbox()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/html_dependency_winbox.md)
  : Winbox JavaScript Dependencies

- [`inputSweetAlert()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/inputSweetAlert.md)
  : Launch an input text dialog

- [`knobInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/knobInput.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** : Knob Input

- [`materialSwitch()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/materialSwitch.md)
  : Material Design Switch Input Control

- [`multiInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/multiInput.md)
  : Create a multiselect input control

- [`noUiSliderInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/noUiSliderInput.md)
  : Numeric range slider

- [`numericInputIcon()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/numericInputIcon.md)
  : Create a numeric input control with icon(s)

- [`numericRangeInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/numericRangeInput.md)
  : Numeric Range Input

- [`pickerGroupUI()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/pickerGroup-module.md)
  [`pickerGroupServer()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/pickerGroup-module.md)
  : Picker Group

- [`pickerInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/pickerInput.md)
  : Select Picker Input Control

- [`pickerOptions()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/pickerOptions.md)
  :

  Options for `pickerInput`

- [`prepare_choices()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/prepare_choices.md)
  :

  Prepare choices for
  [`virtualSelectInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/virtualSelectInput.md)

- [`prepare_slim_choices()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/prepare_slim_choices.md)
  :

  Prepare choices for
  [`slimSelectInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/slimSelectInput.md)

- [`prettyCheckbox()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/prettyCheckbox.md)
  : Pretty Checkbox Input

- [`prettyCheckboxGroup()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/prettyCheckboxGroup.md)
  : Pretty Checkbox Group Input Control

- [`prettyRadioButtons()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/prettyRadioButtons.md)
  : Pretty radio Buttons Input Control

- [`prettySwitch()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/prettySwitch.md)
  : Pretty Switch Input

- [`prettyToggle()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/prettyToggle.md)
  : Pretty Toggle Input

- [`progressBar()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/progress-bar.md)
  [`updateProgressBar()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/progress-bar.md)
  : Progress Bars

- [`progressSweetAlert()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/progressSweetAlert.md)
  : Progress bar in a sweet alert

- [`quercusInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/quercusInput.md)
  : Quercus Input Widget

- [`radioGroupButtons()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/radioGroupButtons.md)
  : Buttons Group Radio Input Control

- [`searchInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/searchInput.md)
  : Search Input

- [`selectizeGroupUI()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/selectizeGroup-module.md)
  [`selectizeGroupServer()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/selectizeGroup-module.md)
  : Selectize Group

- [`setBackgroundColor()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/setBackgroundColor.md)
  : Custom background color for your shinyapp

- [`setBackgroundImage()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/setBackgroundImage.md)
  : Custom background image for your shinyapp

- [`shinyWidgets-package`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/shinyWidgets.md)
  [`shinyWidgets`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/shinyWidgets.md)
  : shinyWidgets: Custom inputs widgets for Shiny.

- [`shinyWidgetsGallery()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/shinyWidgetsGallery.md)
  : Launch the shinyWidget Gallery

- [`show_toast()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/show_toast.md)
  : Show a toast notification

- [`sliderTextInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/sliderTextInput.md)
  : Slider Text Input Widget

- [`slimSelectInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/slimSelectInput.md)
  : Slim Select Input

- [`spectrumInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/spectrumInput.md)
  : Palette Color Picker with Spectrum Library

- [`statiCard()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/stati-card.md)
  [`updateStatiCard()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/stati-card.md)
  : Minimal statistic cards

- [`confirmSweetAlert()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/sweetalert-confirmation.md)
  [`ask_confirmation()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/sweetalert-confirmation.md)
  : Launch a confirmation dialog

- [`sendSweetAlert()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/sweetalert.md)
  [`show_alert()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/sweetalert.md)
  : Display a Sweet Alert to the user

- [`switchInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/switchInput.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** : Bootstrap Switch Input Control

- [`textInputAddon()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/textInputAddon.md)
  : Text with Add-on Input Control

- [`textInputIcon()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/textInputIcon.md)
  : Create a text input control with icon(s)

- [`timeInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/time-input.md)
  [`updateTimeInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/time-input.md)
  : Time input

- [`toggleDropdownButton()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/toggleDropdownButton.md)
  : Toggle a dropdown menu

- [`tooltipOptions()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/tooltipOptions.md)
  : Tooltip options

- [`treeInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/treeInput.md)
  : Tree Input Widget

- [`updateAirDateInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateAirDateInput.md)
  :

  Change the value of
  [`airDatepickerInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/airDatepicker.md)
  on the client

- [`updateAutonumericInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateAutonumericInput.md)
  : Update an Autonumeric Input Object

- [`updateAwesomeCheckbox()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateAwesomeCheckbox.md)
  : Change the value of an awesome checkbox input on the client

- [`updateAwesomeCheckboxGroup()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateAwesomeCheckboxGroup.md)
  :

  Change the value of a `awesomeCheckboxGroup` input on the client

- [`updateAwesomeRadio()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateAwesomeRadio.md)
  : Change the value of a radio input on the client

- [`updateCalendarPro()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateCalendarPro.md)
  : Update calendar pro from server

- [`updateCheckboxGroupButtons()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateCheckboxGroupButtons.md)
  : Change the value of a checkboxes group buttons input on the client

- [`updateColorPickr()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateColorPickr.md)
  : Update color pickr server-side

- [`updateKnobInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateKnobInput.md)
  : Change the value of a knob input on the client

- [`updateMaterialSwitch()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateMaterialSwitch.md)
  : Change the value of a materialSwitch input on the client

- [`updateMultiInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateMultiInput.md)
  : Change the value of a multi input on the client

- [`updateNoUiSliderInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateNoUiSliderInput.md)
  : Change the value of a no ui slider input on the client

- [`updateNumericInputIcon()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateNumericInputIcon.md)
  : Change the value of a numeric input icon on the client

- [`updateNumericRangeInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateNumericRangeInput.md)
  : Change the value of a numeric range input

- [`updatePickerInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updatePickerInput.md)
  : Change the value of a select picker input on the client

- [`updatePrettyCheckbox()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updatePrettyCheckbox.md)
  : Change the value of a pretty checkbox on the client

- [`updatePrettyCheckboxGroup()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updatePrettyCheckboxGroup.md)
  : Change the value of a pretty checkbox on the client

- [`updatePrettyRadioButtons()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updatePrettyRadioButtons.md)
  : Change the value pretty radio buttons on the client

- [`updatePrettySwitch()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updatePrettySwitch.md)
  : Change the value of a pretty switch on the client

- [`updatePrettyToggle()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updatePrettyToggle.md)
  : Change the value of a pretty toggle on the client

- [`updateQuercusInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateQuercusInput.md)
  : Update Tree Input

- [`updateRadioGroupButtons()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateRadioGroupButtons.md)
  : Change the value of a radio group buttons input on the client

- [`updateSearchInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateSearchInput.md)
  : Change the value of a search input on the client

- [`updateSliderTextInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateSliderTextInput.md)
  : Change the value of a slider text input on the client

- [`updateSlimSelect()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateSlimSelect.md)
  : Update slim select from server

- [`updateSpectrumInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateSpectrumInput.md)
  : Change the value of a spectrum input on the client

- [`updateSwitchInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateSwitchInput.md)
  : Change the value of a switch input on the client

- [`updateTextInputIcon()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateTextInputIcon.md)
  : Change the value of a text input icon on the client

- [`updateTreeInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateTreeInput.md)
  : Update Tree Input

- [`updateVerticalTabsetPanel()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateVerticalTabsetPanel.md)
  : Update selected vertical tab

- [`updateVirtualSelect()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/updateVirtualSelect.md)
  : Update virtual select from server

- [`useSweetAlert()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/useSweetAlert.md)
  : Load Sweet Alert dependencies

- [`verticalTabsetPanel()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/vertical-tab.md)
  [`verticalTabPanel()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/vertical-tab.md)
  : Vertical tab panel

- [`virtualSelectInput()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/virtualSelectInput.md)
  : Virtual Select Input

- [`wNumbFormat()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/wNumbFormat.md)
  : Format numbers in noUiSliderInput

- [`wbControls()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/wbControls.md)
  : WinBox controls

- [`wbOptions()`](https://dreamrs.github.io/shinyWidgets/reference/wbOptions.md)
  : WinBox Options
